summary: Spanforge is a dark, terminal-flavoured marketing site for an OpenTelemetry-native distributed tracing platform aimed at staff engineers and SREs, with dense data-feeling layouts, trace waterfalls, code snippets and a restrained signal-lime accent.

pages.title: Home
pages.purpose: Product overview, hero trace waterfall, feature grid, sampling and cost story.

pages.title: Platform
pages.purpose: Deep dive into trace explorer, service map, alerting and cost controls.

pages.title: How it works
pages.purpose: Primer on traces, spans, context propagation and head vs. tail sampling.

pages.title: Integrations
pages.purpose: Language SDKs, infrastructure integrations and outbound alerting/export.

pages.title: Pricing
pages.purpose: Three tiers, comparison table, cost math and billing FAQ.

pages.title: Changelog
pages.purpose: Versioned release history of backend, SDK, console and security changes.
